def negative_rate_limit_429_response_missing_retry_after_header_or_stable_body():
    rule_id = "rate_limit_429_response_missing_retry_after_header_or_stable_body"
    family = "observability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "HTTP 429 response returned without a Retry-After header or stable body field."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
